'''Sando HoverFreighters''' were flying, planetary trade vessels were used by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], employing their unique biotechnology. They were steered by dozens of leg-like oars made of the same material as the tentacle-propellers on Gungan [[bongo]]s. Slithering on a cloud of compressed air, the freighter was easily mistaken for a living creature. These craft were named after the indigenous [[Sando aqua monster/Legends|sando aqua monsters]] of Naboo.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
